arts.ttl: Kylian Mbappe gets Neymar treatment as Liverpool man becomes new talk of Anfield
arts.sum: Ian Doyle looks at Liverpool's Champions League win over Real Madrid and an outstanding performance from a right-back who isn't Trent Alexander-Arnold

arts.ttl: Three questions and three answers from Liverpool 2-0 Real Madrid
arts.sum: When injury to Vinícius was confirmed on Monday, the first thought was how Carlo Ancelotti would line his side up for the biggest game of the next month that the Brazilian will miss. At no point in this match did Real Madrid have control of the game, the three shots on target coming from a missed penalty and two injury time attempts going to prove as much.

arts.ttl: Liverpool beat holders Real Madrid with Aston Villa denied win against Juventus
arts.sum: Celtic drew at home with Club Brugge.

arts.ttl: Jude Bellingham gives Liverpool ultimate compliment as he addresses Kylian Mbappe's woes
arts.sum: Jude Bellingham and Real Madrid were outclassed by Liverpool in the Champions League but the England star confessed his side were beaten by Europe's best team right now

arts.ttl: 'Really disappointing to say' - Real Madrid star Jude Bellingham makes huge Liverpool admission
arts.sum: Liverpool beat Jude Bellingham's Real Madrid 2-0 at Anfield in a brilliant Champions League performance

arts.ttl: Liverpool suffer injury blow despite Real Madrid win as Ibrahim Konate helped off
arts.sum: Liverpool enjoyed an excellent evening against Real Madrid as goals from Alexis Mac Allister and Cody Gakpo secured a memorable win at Anfield but there was a late concern for Reds boss Arne Slot

arts.ttl: Arne Slot reveals half-time team talk that inspired Liverpool's statement win over Real Madrid
arts.sum: Liverpool flew out of the blocks after the restart as they beat the European champions

arts.ttl: Real Madrid teammate defends Kylian Mbappé after Liverpool defeat
arts.sum: Real Madrid star Kylian Mbappé has this evening received the backing of teammate Luka Modrić. This comes fresh off another outing to forget for the Frenchman in the colours of…

arts.ttl: Slot delighted as Liverpool beat ‘pain in the ass’ Real Madrid
arts.sum: Arne Slot was delighted after Liverpool maintained their perfect record in the Champions League with a 2-0 win over Real Madrid. Alexis Mac Allister and Cody Gakpo were on target for Liverpool as the Reds beat the European champions at Anfield. arts.ttl: Conor Bradley and Ibrahima Konate injury worries for Liverpool immediately after Real Madrid victory
arts.sum: Ibrahima Konate and Conor Bradley were both late casualties of Liverpool's 2-0 win over Real Madrid
